====Pokémon====
This listing is of Wikstrom's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Scizor
|mega=yes
|type1=Bug
|type2=Steel
|img=Wikstrom Mega Scizor.png
|cap=Wikstrom's Mega Scizor
|epnum=M17
|epname=Diancie and the Cocoon of Destruction
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc=Wikstrom used his {{p|Scizor}} in a battle against [[Diantha's Gardevoir]], with both Pokémon [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolved]]. Despite a type advantage, Mega Scizor lost the battle in a single hit.

None of Scizor's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Aegislash
|type1=Steel
|type2=Ghost
|img=Wikstrom Aegislash.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc=Wikstrom used an {{p|Aegislash}} to impede {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] during their final challenge at the [[Castle of Chivalry]]. The battle was called off once Goh managed to get the key from Wikstrom's {{p|Klefki}}, successfully completing the challenge.

Aegislash known moves are {{m|Sacred Sword}} and {{m|King's Shield}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Stance Change}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Probopass
|type1=Rock
|type2=Steel
|img=Wikstrom Probopass.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Probopass}} was one of the obstacles {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] had to overcome at the [[Castle of Chivalry]]. Using magnetism, it made it difficult for Ash and Goh to move in the armor they were wearing. 

None of Probopass's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Litwick
|type1=Ghost
|type2=Fire
|img=Wikstrom Litwick.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Litwick}} provided light for the obstacles {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] encountered at the [[Castle of Chivalry]].

None of Litwick's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Escavalier
|type1=Bug
|type2=Steel
|img=Wikstrom Escavalier.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=Noriaki Kanze
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Escavalier}} was among the obstacles that [[Goh]] encountered at the [[Castle of Chivalry]]. He battled it briefly with his {{TP|Goh|Scyther}} before it retreated.

In ''[[JN103|The Future is Now, Thanks to Strategy!]]'', Escavalier was used in Wikstrom's battle against [[Drasna]] and her {{p|Altaria}}.

Escavalier's known moves are {{m|Fury Cutter}} and {{m|Fell Stinger}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Dedenne
|type1=Electric
|type2=Fairy
|img=Wikstrom Dedenne.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=
|vaen=Alyson Leigh Rosenfeld
|desc={{p|Dedenne}} was one of the Pokémon used during the second phase of Wikstrom's training. While following his {{AP|Farfetch'd}}, {{Ash}} found it and let his guard down, receiving an electric shock. Soon after, Dedenne ran off back into the castle walls.

Dedenne's only known move is {{m|Nuzzle}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Honedge
|type1=Steel
|type2=Ghost
|img=Wikstrom Honedge.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Honedge}} attempted a sneak attack against [[Ash's Farfetch'd]], but the ambush was foiled by its Trainer.

None of Honedge's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wikstrom
|pkmn=Klefki
|type1=Steel
|type2=Fairy
|img=Wikstrom Klefki.png
|epnum=JN056
|epname=Searching for Chivalry!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Klefki}} was among the obstacles that {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] encountered at the [[Castle of Chivalry]]. To pass the final challenge, Ash and Goh were tasked with taking the key Klefki was holding. By teaming up with his {{TP|Goh|Scyther}}, Goh succeeded in grabbing the key, completing the challenge.

Klefki's only known move is {{m|Fairy Wind}}.}}
